mapper.select: SELECT id, agency_id, crew_code, name, phone, role, project_count, work_days, recent_work_date, safety_training, rating, created_at FROM admin_crew_members WHERE agency_id = #{agencyId} ORDER BY name ASC
SELECT project_code FROM admin_crew_project_links WHERE crew_id = #{crewId}

SELECT id, agency_id, contract_code, crew_name, crew_role, project_name, project_code, contract_type, sent_date, signed_date, status, created_at FROM admin_contracts WHERE agency_id = #{agencyId} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT id, agency_id, settlement_code, crew_name, crew_role, work_hours, hourly_rate, pre_tax, deduction, net_pay, status, project_code, created_at FROM admin_settlements WHERE agency_id = #{agencyId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT id, agency_id, room_code, title, preview, room_time, room_type, project_code, avatar_text, avatar_color, created_at FROM admin_chat_rooms WHERE agency_id = #{agencyId} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT id, agency_id, incident_code, title, project_name, location, reporter, incident_time, status, project_code, created_at FROM admin_safenet_incidents WHERE agency_id = #{agencyId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT id, agency_id, content, activity_date, created_at FROM admin_activities WHERE agency_id = #{agencyId} ORDER BY activity_date DESC, id DESC LIMIT 10
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO admin_education_settings (agency_id, project_code, ktl_required, site_required) VALUES (#{agencyId}, #{projectCode}, #{ktlRequired}, #{siteRequired})
mapper.update: UPDATE admin_education_settings SET ktl_required = #{ktlRequired}, site_required = #{siteRequired}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM admin_settlements WHERE agency_id = #{agencyId} AND status = #{status}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM admin_crew_members WHERE agency_id = #{agencyId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM admin_safenet_incidents WHERE agency_id = #{agencyId} AND status = #{status}
